seoTitle: Farmborough Heights vs Farrants Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Farmborough Heights and Farrants Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Farmborough Heights vs Farrants Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Farmborough Heights and Farrants Hill.
heading: Farmborough Heights vs Farrants Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Farmborough Heights, New South Wales and Farrants Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Farmborough Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Farrants Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Farmborough Heights or Farrants Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Farmborough Heights has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Farrants Hill scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Farmborough Heights scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Farrants Hill scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Farmborough Heights or Farrants Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Farmborough Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
